title: GEP Evolution Pipeline
description: Candidate generation, evaluation, mutation, solidification, and strategy selection for agent evolution

modules.name: candidates
modules.notes: expandSignals derives structured tags (e.g. 'problem:performance', 'action:optimize', 'problem:stagnation') from weak signals. extractCapabilityCandidates builds candidates from failed capsules and session transcript.

modules.name: candidateEval
internal_flow: calls extractCapabilityCandidates() with recentFailedCapsules from assetStore
reads recent candidates + external candidates from assetStore
scores external candidates via matchPatternToSignals() from selector
filters/sorts by score, returns preview text + new candidates
modules.notes: Obfuscated source. API reconstructed from import declarations and test usage.

modules.name: selector
exported_functions: selectGene(genes, signals, opts) → {selected: Gene|null, alternatives: Gene[], driftIntensity: number, reason: string[]}
selectGeneAndCapsule({genes, capsules, signals, memoryAdvice, driftEnabled}) → {selectedGene, selector, selectionPath, memoryUsed, memoryEvidence}
modules.notes: selectGene applies memory-based score multipliers (preferredGeneId), downweights genes with repeated hard-fail anti_patterns, uses expandSignals-derived tags for indirect matching. Drift = 1/sqrt(genePoolSize) + offset (0.3→0.02 decaying with memoryEvidence). Supports 'baseName:snippet' signal matching.

modules.name: mutation
exported_functions: buildMutation({signals, selectedGene, driftEnabled, allowHighRisk, personalityState}) → Mutation
category_logic: high-risk personality (rigor<0.4 OR risk_tolerance>0.65) → downgrades innovate to 'optimize'
modules.notes: isHighRiskMutationAllowed requires rigor>=0.6 AND risk_tolerance<=0.5. normalizeMutation defaults: category='optimize', risk_level='low'.

modules.name: solidify
exported_functions: computeProcessScores({constraintCheck, validation, protocolViolations, canary, blast, geneUsed, signals, mutation}) → {validation_pass_rate, blast_control, ...}
modules.notes: adaptGeneFromLearning on success: adds problem/area learning signals into gene.signals_match + appends to gene.learning_history. On failure: records anti_patterns without broadening signals_match. classifyFailureMode: destructive constraints → hard+non-retryable; protocol violations → hard; validation failures → soft+retryable.

modules.name: strategy
modules.notes: Each strategy has repair+optimize+innovate+(explore) ratios summing to 1.0. repairLoopThreshold controls when repair-loop guard triggers.

key_data_types.name: Gene
key_data_types.fields: type:'Gene', id:string, category:string, signals_match:string[], strategy:string[], validation:string[], constraints:{max_files}, summary, anti_patterns:[{mode, learning_signals}], learning_history:[{outcome, mode}], a2a

key_data_types.name: Capsule
key_data_types.fields: type:'Capsule', id:string, gene:string, trigger:string[], summary:string, confidence:float, outcome:{status, score}, failure_reason, blast_radius, success_streak, a2a

key_data_types.name: Mutation
key_data_types.fields: type:'Mutation', id:'mut_...', category:'repair'|'optimize'|'innovate', trigger_signals:string[], target:string, expected_effect:string, risk_level:'low'|'medium'|'high', rationale:string

key_data_types.name: StrategyPreset
key_data_types.fields: name:string, repair:float, optimize:float, innovate:float, explore:float, repairLoopThreshold:number, label:string, description:string

key_data_types.name: Candidate
key_data_types.fields: source:'failed_capsules'|string, tags:string[], gene, score:number, type, id

key_relationships: candidateEval depends_on assetStore (readRecentCandidates, readRecentExternalCandidates, readRecentFailedCapsules, appendCandidateJsonl)
candidates depends_on selector (matchPatternToSignals for scoring external candidates)
selector reads Gene[] and Capsule[] from assetStore
pipeline_flow: 3. appendCandidateJsonl() each new candidate to assetStore
4. selectGeneAndCapsule({genes, capsules, signals, memoryAdvice, driftEnabled}) → {selectedGene, selector}
6. buildGepPrompt({nowIso, context, signals, selector, mutation, strategy, candidates}) → LLM prompt
7. LLM executes evolution (external, produces diff + code changes)
8. solidify({gene, mutation, signals, blast, validation, constraintCheck, ...}) →
c. adaptGeneFromLearning() → mutates gene with learning signals
d. upsertGene() / appendCapsule() / appendFailedCapsule() to assetStore
supporting_modules: assetStore.js - JSONL/JSON file I/O for genes, capsules, candidates, events
policyCheck.js - Constraint checking, blast radius analysis, validation command allowlist
gitOps.js - Git diff operations, critical path protection
paths.js - Path resolution (getRepoRoot, getEvolutionDir, getGepAssetsDir, getMemoryDir)
personality.js - Agent personality state (rigor, risk_tolerance, creativity)
important_notes: All 6 core GEP files (candidates.js, candidateEval.js, mutation.js, solidify.js, strategy.js, selector.js) are obfuscated in the JS source. Module APIs reconstructed via test files, IR imports, and unobfuscated assetStore functions. The evolutionary loop is: strategy → candidates → gene selection → mutation → LLM execution → solidification. The selector uses genetic drift (population-size-dependent randomization) to avoid local optima. Gene adaptation via adaptGeneFromLearning creates a feedback loop between run outcomes and future gene selection.
source_files_analyzed: src/gep/candidateEval.js (obfuscated - API from IR import declarations)
